author: y4rr
content: AC-18 (qnd-trial-intel-rs design doc): scaled JsonSchemaProcessor sampled-completion coverage from 1k to 10k per schema (release; debug stays 1k for fast cargo test). 5 schemas × 10000 trials = 50000 completions, all parse + validate. Commit 9b87d105 on main. Issue #558 has its result comment posted but cross-repo close from qnd-trial-intel-rs's session is blocked by that repo's hook (the hook resolves to qnd-trial-intel-rs's DB, doesn't see issue 558 there, and refuses to close). Run 'crosslink issue close 558' from a ferrotorch-rooted shell to finalize.
